---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a feature, test, doc improvement, or chore for Parabola
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you are proposing. -->

## Motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? Be specific -- not "this would be nice" but "X currently fails/is missing when Y". -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the user-facing behavior and, if you have one, the implementation approach. -->

## Scope

- **Area:** arc / stellar / iris / encoding / examples / docs / ci
- **Network:** testnet / mainnet / both
- **Breaking change:** yes / no

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Other approaches you considered and why you didn't pick them. -->

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ]
- [ ] Covered by a test in `tests/`
- [ ] Documented in the README if it changes the public API

## Additional Context

<!-- Diagrams, links to Circle/Arc/Stellar docs, related issues. -->
